tasks.title: Run pre-implementation verification checks
tasks.description:
Before touching any code, verify the spec's assumptions match codebase state. (1) Confirm SPEC-053 completion: `rg 'findAllWithRelations' packages/service-core/src/types/index.ts` and `packages/db/src/base/base.model.ts` — both must show the `tx` param. (2) Confirm no circular deps: `rg "from '@repo/service-core'" packages/db/src/ --type ts` must return 0 results. (3) Confirm PaginatedListOutput is exported from @repo/schemas: `rg 'PaginatedListOutput' packages/schemas/src/index.ts`. (4) Confirm both EventOrganizer files exist and check getTableName values. (5) Count model subclasses: `rg 'extends BaseModel<' packages/db/src/models/ --count-matches | wc -l` — should be 39. (6) Inventory all BaseModel imports for backward-compat verification baseline.

Test requirements: No code to test. Document results in a comment/note. Fail fast if any assumption is wrong — update spec before proceeding.

subtasks.title: Verify SPEC-053 findAllWithRelations tx param exists in both interface and impl
Verify @repo/db does NOT import from @repo/service-core (no circular dep)
Verify @repo/schemas does NOT import from @repo/db (no circular dep)
Verify PaginatedListOutput is exported from @repo/schemas index
Verify both EventOrganizer files exist + check their getTableName return values
Count model subclasses extending BaseModel (should be 39)

tasks.title: Create packages/db/src/types.ts with DrizzleClient and QueryContext
tasks.description:
Create new file `packages/db/src/types.ts`. Add: (1) `DrizzleClient` type alias using `PgDatabase<NodePgQueryResultHKT, typeof schema, ExtractTablesWithRelations<typeof schema>>` — NOT a union type. (2) `QueryContext` interface with `tx?: DrizzleClient` property and JSDoc per spec section 1. Imports needed: `PgDatabase` from `drizzle-orm/pg-core`, `NodePgQueryResultHKT` from `drizzle-orm/node-postgres`, `ExtractTablesWithRelations` from `drizzle-orm`, `schema` from `./client`. Do NOT add the `BaseModel<T>` interface yet (that's T-003). Leave the file open for the next task to append to it.

Test requirements: Unit — none (pure type definitions). Verify with `pnpm typecheck --filter @repo/db` after completion (should pass since nothing imports this file yet).

subtasks.title: Create packages/db/src/types.ts with correct imports

Add QueryContext interface with tx?: DrizzleClient + JSDoc

tasks.title: Add BaseModel<T> interface definition to packages/db/src/types.ts
tasks.description:
Append the complete `BaseModel<T extends Record<string, unknown>>` interface to `packages/db/src/types.ts` (created in T-002). The interface must include all 14 members: 13 methods with `tx?: DrizzleClient` where applicable + `getTable(): Table`. Add imports: `SQL` from `drizzle-orm`, `Table` from `drizzle-orm`, `PaginatedListOutput` from `@repo/schemas`. All methods must have JSDoc per spec section 1. The `count()` method nests tx inside `options` object. The `findWithRelations` JSDoc must note that the base implementation is a FALLBACK ignoring the `relations` param. Use full interface definition from spec section 1 verbatim.

Test requirements: No runtime tests (pure types). Verify with `pnpm typecheck --filter @repo/db`.

tasks.title: Export DrizzleClient, QueryContext, BaseModel from packages/db/src/index.ts
tasks.description:
Edit `packages/db/src/index.ts`. Add the line: `export type { DrizzleClient, QueryContext, BaseModel } from './types';`. Place it alongside the other type exports. This makes all three types part of the public @repo/db API.

Test requirements: No runtime tests. Verify with `pnpm typecheck --filter @repo/db`. Confirm the types are importable: check if any consumer already imports these names to avoid name collisions.

tasks.title: Update withTransaction callback type in packages/db/src/client.ts
tasks.description:
Edit `packages/db/src/client.ts`. Change `withTransaction` callback parameter type from `NodePgDatabase<typeof schema>` to `DrizzleClient`. Add import: `import type { DrizzleClient } from './types';`. Keep `NodePgDatabase` import if it's still used by `getDb()` return type — verify before removing. Do NOT change the `getDb()` return type (intentionally stays `NodePgDatabase<typeof schema>`).

Test requirements: No new tests needed (pure type change). Verify with `pnpm typecheck --filter @repo/db`. Confirm existing callers of `withTransaction` still compile (the callback type is widened, not narrowed).

tasks.title: Rename BaseModel to BaseModelImpl and update generic constraint and getClient() in base.model.ts
tasks.description:
Edit `packages/db/src/base/base.model.ts`. (a) Add import: `import type { DrizzleClient } from '../types';`. (b) Add generic constraint: change `BaseModel<T>` to `BaseModelImpl<T extends Record<string, unknown>>`. (c) Rename class declaration from `abstract class BaseModel` to `abstract class BaseModelImpl` — do NOT add the `implements` clause yet (that's T-014). (d) Change `getClient(tx?: NodePgDatabase<typeof schema>): NodePgDatabase<typeof schema>` to `getClient(tx?: DrizzleClient): DrizzleClient`. Add JSDoc: 'Returns the provided tx if available, otherwise returns the default db connection from getDb(). Safe to call with undefined.' (e) Check if `NodePgDatabase` import can be removed yet (it cannot — still used in method signatures which are updated in T-007).

Test requirements: Run `pnpm typecheck --filter @repo/db` after this task. The backward-compat re-export (added in T-007) is needed for tests to pass without changes, so T-006 alone may show test failures — that's expected and resolved in T-007.

tasks.title: Update all 13 method tx params in base.model.ts to DrizzleClient + add backward-compat re-export
tasks.description:
Edit `packages/db/src/base/base.model.ts`. (a) Change ALL 13 method `tx` parameter types from `NodePgDatabase<typeof schema>` to `DrizzleClient`: findById, findOne, create, update, updateById, softDelete, restore, hardDelete, count, findAll, findAllWithRelations, findWithRelations, raw. NOTE: count() nests tx inside options object. NOTE: findAllWithRelations already has tx (from SPEC-053) — this is a TYPE change only, not a new param. (b) Remove `NodePgDatabase` import from `drizzle-orm/node-postgres` if it's no longer referenced elsewhere in the file. (c) Add backward-compat re-export at bottom of file: `/** @deprecated Use BaseModelImpl directly. */ export { BaseModelImpl as BaseModel };`. (d) Run `pnpm typecheck --filter @repo/db` — must pass.

Test requirements: After this task, run `pnpm test --filter @repo/db`. Existing base.model.test.ts uses `extends BaseModel<DummyType>` — must still work via the backward-compat alias.

tasks.title: Consolidate duplicate EventOrganizer models
tasks.description:
Two files exist: `packages/db/src/models/event/eventOrganizer.model.ts` (minimal, active) and `packages/db/src/models/eventOrganizer.model.ts` (complete, orphaned). (1) Copy content of orphaned root-level file into `packages/db/src/models/event/eventOrganizer.model.ts`. (2) Adjust import path from `'../base/base.model.ts'` to `'../../base/base.model.ts'`. (3) CRITICAL: Fix getTableName() — the orphaned file returns `'event_organizers'` which is WRONG for db.query access. Must return `'eventOrganizers'` (matching the JS variable name from the schema export). (4) Update the consolidated file to use `BaseModelImpl` in import and extends clause (part of the mechanical rename). (5) Delete the orphaned root-level file `packages/db/src/models/eventOrganizer.model.ts`. (6) Verify the event/index.ts still exports EventOrganizerModel correctly.

Test requirements: Run `pnpm test --filter @repo/db` focusing on EventOrganizer tests. Confirm findWithRelations works (has override). Confirm no import from orphaned path remains.

tasks.title: Add implements BaseModel<T> clause to BaseModelImpl in base.model.ts
tasks.description:
Edit `packages/db/src/base/base.model.ts`. Add `implements BaseModel<T>` clause to the class declaration: `export abstract class BaseModelImpl<T extends Record<string, unknown>> implements BaseModel<T>`. Add the import: `import type { BaseModel } from '../types';` (same-package import, zero circular dependency risk). This is the step that TypeScript uses to enforce the interface contract — any method mismatch will immediately appear as a typecheck error.

Test requirements: Run `pnpm typecheck --filter @repo/db` immediately after this change. Any method signature mismatch between BaseModelImpl and BaseModel<T> will surface here. Fix mismatches before proceeding.

Run `pnpm test --filter @repo/db --filter @repo/service-core`. All existing tests must pass — no regressions introduced. Critical files: (1) `packages/db/test/models/base.model.test.ts` — uses `extends BaseModel<DummyType>` via backward-compat alias. (2) `packages/service-core/test/utils/modelMockFactory.ts` — uses `extends BaseModel<T>` from @repo/db. (3) All crud tests in service-core that import BaseModel as type annotation. (4) EventOrganizer-related tests — verify findWithRelations override works correctly after consolidation.

Test requirements: Zero test failures. If tests fail, diagnose and fix. Do NOT change test assertions — only fix implementation if a genuine bug is introduced.

tasks.title: Run pnpm lint and fix all biome errors
tasks.description:
Run `pnpm lint` (or `pnpm check`) across all affected packages. Fix any biome errors introduced. Common gotchas for this spec: (1) `useDefaultParameterLast` — if any optional `tx?` param was placed before required params. (2) `noUnusedVariables` — check for any leftover imports (e.g., NodePgDatabase removed from imports). (3) `noExplicitAny` — ensure no `any` types snuck in. (4) Missing JSDoc on exported symbols (biome may warn). All errors must be zero before marking complete.

Test requirements: `pnpm lint` must return zero errors. Run: `cd /home/qazuor/projects/WEBS/hospeda && pnpm lint`.
